pageContext.name: Abu with Genie Lamp Scene
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Enesco are proud to present the Abu with Genie Lamp Scene Figurine!  Abu, Aladdin's curious monkey friend, has gotten his hands on the magic lamp in this beautiful Jim Shore character sculpt. Enchanted by the secrets held within the lamp, Abu rubs his tiny paw upon the metal revealing the gregarious blue Genie inside.  Don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your Disney collection today!
